name: build-fix
description: Lint, type-check, and build until everything is green.
fixPrompt: The checks above failed with the attached output. Fix the root cause of each lint, type, or build error. Prefer the project's auto-fix command for trivially auto-fixable lint issues, then re-check.
guardrails: Never silence an error with a suppression comment (e.g. type-checker ignores, lint-disable) — fix the underlying type or code.
Never weaken compiler or linter configuration to converge.
onExhausted: Stop. Report each remaining error verbatim, which files were changed per iteration, and the suspected root cause for anything still red.
